channel.title: Project Sekai on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Project Sekai on yexca'Blog

item.title: Project Sekai IP Rules
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

Introduction

I can connect to the game directly, but using a game booster or VPN blocks access. Since toggling the VPN every time I launch the game is a hassle and I couldn’t find a fix online, I’m documenting it here. (Note: Using the iOS JP server).

Solution

By checking the log files, I identified the domain used during the initial connection.

Just add the following domain to your DIRECT rules:
